title: Finesse Mastery
summary: Finesse branches between disciplined pathfinding and razor-edged positional combat. The mobile fighter wins by choosing where and when to engage — not by hitting harder.

thresholds.title: First Step
thresholds.description: Choose how you move through danger.

thresholds.title: Charted Routes
thresholds.description: Your movement habits become more intentional.

thresholds.title: Shadowstep
thresholds.description: Late mastery cements your command of distance and approach.

nodes.title: Wayfarer's Script
nodes.description: The first leaf teaches that position is a blade sharpened before any arrow is loosed.

nodes.title: Ranger's True Draw
nodes.description: A ranger's notation insists that calm breath and measured pull bend distance to your will.

nodes.title: Acrobat's Lightstep
nodes.description: The acrobat chapter praises feet that leave no promise for an enemy to punish.

nodes.title: Kiting Arc
nodes.description: Trail diagrams show retreating lines that keep prey forever one stride too far.

nodes.title: Slipline
nodes.description: This passage maps sidesteps that turn committed swings into wasted momentum.

nodes.title: Crossline Reading
nodes.description: Between shot and step, this folio teaches reading intent before steel can answer.

nodes.title: Last-Light Mark
nodes.description: Hunters' notes claim twilight itself favors the patient archer who never hurries a kill.

nodes.title: Deadwind Volley
nodes.description: The outer pages describe fletching storms that herd foes as surely as any wall.

nodes.title: Reversal Step
nodes.description: A narrow hand records the instant a retreating heel becomes an advancing threat.

nodes.title: Knife Dance
nodes.description: This leaf praises spinning routes through crowded blades where hesitation cannot live.

nodes.title: Horizon Liturgy
nodes.description: Hidden beneath wax, this verse teaches arrows to rule land no boot has reached.

nodes.title: Midair Verdict
nodes.description: A veiled coda claims the master acrobat decides outcomes while neither foot has landed.
